final:
module VirtualMemoryDecoder(  
    input [31:0] physical_address,  
    output [19:0] page_number,  
    output [11:0] offset  
);  
    assign page_number = physical_address[31:12]; // Extract upper 20 bits  
    assign offset = physical_address[11:0];       // Extract lower 12 bits  
endmodule
